IMPORTANT caveat for human review: ours-title 'Getz/Gilberto' evokes the famous 1964 Stan Getz / João Gilberto bossa-nova album, but the MB match (similarity 1.0) and ALL 6 keyTracks belong to a different release — 'The Getz-Gilberto Story' (Deja Vu, IT, 1989), whose tracks (Diaper Pin, Interlude on Bebop, Stan's Mood, Always, Night and Day, I Got It Bad) are early/bop Stan Getz material, NOT the Gilberto collaboration (no Girl from Ipanema / Corcovado / Desafinado). Judging ours-vs-evidence strictly: artist Stan Getz matches and every keyTrack matches the provided MB tracklist exactly, so there is no contradiction to flag — hence 'clean' at low confidence. But this catalog entry likely conflates two distinct albums; a repair-writer should decide whether the intended album is the 1964 'Getz/Gilberto' (in which case title is right but tracks/MB are wrong) or 'The Getz-Gilberto Story' (in which case the title should change). No year claim (year null).
